attributes.action: Stop Ignoring Endometriosis Pain – Fix Women’s Healthcare Now
attributes.additional_details: I want the Government and Parliament to take action on endometriosis because too many people suffer for years before being diagnosed or receiving proper care. Symptoms are often dismissed as normal period pain, leaving people in severe pain without support. Endometriosis can seriously affect health, education, work and quality of life. I believe more awareness, better medical training and improved access to specialist care are needed so people are diagnosed earlier and treated properly.
attributes.background: Many wait years for a diagnosis and struggle to access specialist care. We call on the Government to improve GP training, speed up diagnosis, expand NHS specialist services, fund research and increase awareness.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Fund improvement to PCOS, Endometriosis, and Fertility Health care and treatment
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757794

Set a maximum 6‑month diagnosis target for endometriosis
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756697
